title: Herald of the King's Decline
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Herald of the King's Decline''''' was an opera that held its premier at the [[Coruscant Opera/Legends|Coruscant Opera]].<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
